name: ai-crm-platform
description: AI-powered CRM with contacts, campaigns, telephony, and intelligent automation

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.build:functions: cd functions && npm ci --prefer-offline --no-audit --progress=false && npm run build
scripts.build:netlify: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:functions && node ./scripts/copy-netlify-functions.js
